title: erophila verna var. cabillonensis
intro: Erophila verna var. cabillonensis, also known as early Forget-me-not, is a variety of the Erophila verna plant, a low-growing, annual or biennial herb native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant is used in herbal medicine for its expectorant, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Erophila verna var. cabillonensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system, making it a natural remedy for colds and flu. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
